title: T8 Doc truth: DF-ADR provenance flattening + KDD uniformity
prompt: Dark Factory's 42 DF-ADR decision files (docs/kdd/decisions/0001..0044) carry a NESTED provenance: frontmatter block (sessions/files/commits sub-keys) that flat parsers silently lose — kdd-viewer's store shows all 42 decisions as provenance 'none' while the data sits in the markdown. decisions.md Q9 (2026-07-06) locked the fix: flatten to Lisa's flat emit convention (top-level provenance: scalar + sessions:/files:/commits: inline lists — the shape Lisa >=5.12.1 emits and that Cortex's and KBDE's 48/48 decisions already carry on disk; dark-factory is the LAST divergent KDD instance). Flatten the 42 files + docs/kdd/decisions/TEMPLATE.md + the ADR-FORMAT-SPEC.md example; record the format REVERSAL properly (Q9 reverses David's 2026-07-04 'nesting stays' ruling — append to ADR-0044's Revision Log and supersede the spec's ruling blockquote with the old ruling quoted, never erased); close the stale backlog/2026-07-04-kdd-uniformity-findings.md note into backlog/done/; append dated corrections to kdd-viewer's three stale instance notes (/Users/davidcruwys/dev/ad/apps/kdd-viewer/instances/{dark-factory,cortex,kbde}.json) and rescan all four instances (scan.py); commit and push both repos (dark-factory: only docs/kdd/ + the backlog move; kdd-viewer: only instances/ store/instances/ view/). Cortex, KBDE, and SupportSignal repos are strictly read-only; frontmatter shape changes only, all values verbatim, body prose untouched. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T8-05-adr-flattening-kdd-uniformity.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In dark-factory: grep -rn '^[ \t]\+sessions:' docs/kdd/decisions/ docs/kdd/ADR-FORMAT-SPEC.md returns 0 hits; grep -l '^provenance: reconstructed-from-sessions' docs/kdd/decisions/0*.md | wc -l == 41 and '^provenance: hand-authored' == 1 (ADR-0044) and '^files:' == 42; ADR-0044 contains both 'REVERSAL of the 2026-07-04' (new) and 'Flatten-for-flat-parsers rejected' (old, append-only) and ADR-FORMAT-SPEC.md contains 'supersedes 2026-07-04' plus the quoted old ruling; backlog/done/2026-07-04-kdd-uniformity-findings.done.md exists with a 'STATUS — CLOSED' section and the old path is gone. In kdd-viewer: store/instances/dark-factory.json has 42 decisions with 0 provenance style 'none'; query.py dark-factory --grep supersede --type decision still returns the ADR-0020/0021 pair; each of instances/{dark-factory,cortex,kbde}.json greps 'wg-t8-05' exactly once. Negative: 0021 still has 'supersedes: ADR-0020', exactly 3 decisions remain 'status: accepted' (0009/0028/0031), no diffs under research/ canonical/ engine/ CLAUDE.md, and cortex/KBDE/SupportSignal repos show no new dirt. Both wg-t8-05 commits pushed (dark-factory + kdd-viewer).
